    qt misaliba

    misaliba · he/him

    Hi there, I’m Misaliba, an 18-year-old developer from Czechia currently attending pslib.cz high school.

    I have a passion for working on low-level projects, including my own operating system.

    However, I also enjoy building infrastructure-focused systems, such as custom container orchestrators and reverse proxies.

    Currently, I’m primarily creating projects to gain a deeper understanding of how things work under the hood and how different components interact before embarking on more significant and serious projects.
